Include a rendered table in the page margin (approximation)

Source: R/zzo2f-include.R
zzo2f_include_margin.Rd

Emits #place(right, dx: ...)[...] which floats the figure toward the page margin. True marginfigure semantics (automatic margin-parallel placement) require the document to reserve margin space via #set page(margin: (right: ...)).

Usage

zzo2f_include_margin(
  path,
  caption = NULL,
  label = NULL,
  width = "4cm",
  offset = "100%",
  method = NULL,
  cat = TRUE
)

Arguments

path

Path to the image file.

caption

Character or NULL.

label

Character or NULL.

width

Width spec.

method

Ignored for Typst; retained for API symmetry with o2f_include_margin().

cat

Logical.

Value

Character; printed when cat = TRUE.

On this page
